_about: Offset words inside the code image that index into rebuilt NitroFS text banks (data/files); they must match the rebuilt banks' layout. The builder writes 'value' after asserting 'old_value'.

entries.what: battle-text bank (file 1da) 129-entry u32 offset table, entry 1
entries.why: the bank grew: entry 1 re-aimed at the appended grown block (offset = the original bank size)
one record's text is read straight from this u32 offset into the decompressed bank; re-aimed at a re-encoded record
